contextual.title: Comparison of CXR and MnDCT
contextual.text:
Summary: A comparison of chest x-ray (CXR) and Minimum dose CT (MnDCT) in the acutely ill patient. The hypothesis is that MnDCT is more sensitive than CXR in the detection of acute findings in the acutely ill patient.
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 All patients admitted for investigation of acute pulmonary embolus 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 none

metadata.inclusion_criteria:
inclusion criteria:
